findings.title: kicad-cli is unavailable
findings.message: kicad-cli was not found, so KiCad-backed ERC and DRC checks were skipped.
findings.remediation: Install KiCad CLI or configure kicad-cli-path.

findings.title: firmware pinmap is inconsistent with declared hardware mapping
findings.message: Pinmap net MCU_PA1 for U1.1 was not found in extracted schematic labels.
findings.remediation: Update firmware pinmap or schematic net labels to match.
